name: Dak's Banana-Nut Wheat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the yeast into the bread machine.
2. Add the whole wheat flour and salt to the yeast.
3. Pour in the maple syrup and maple extract (if using).
4. Toss in the chopped pecans, sliced ripe banana, and warm water.
5. Select the "whole wheat" setting on the bread machine.
6. Press "start" to begin baking.
